title: polygala preslii
intro: Polygala preslii, also known as Yacón or Mexican Potentilla, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the Americas, belonging to the Polygalaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Polygala preslii include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is necessary to confirm its safety and efficacy.
